query:
INSERT INTO server_volumes
           (id, server_id, name, placement, placement_id, project_name, gpu_slot_id, gpu_group_id, path,
            created_by, created_at, updated_at)
           VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
           ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE updated_at = updated_at
